title: chieniopteris harlandii
intro: Chieniopteris harlandii, also known as New Zealand fern, is a type of plant species native to the Pacific Islands. It has been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant has been found to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation and fighting off infections, making it a popular herbal remedy. Chieniopteris harlandii can be prepared in various forms, including infusions, tinctures, and salves, which are often used to treat wounds and skin irritations.
